/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/daemon_integration_tests.dir/test_daemon_integration.cpp.o -o daemon_integration_tests  ../libcamera_core.a -lcamera -lcamera-base -lpthread -lrt -ljpeg -lpthread -lrt -lgstrtspserver-1.0 -lgstapp-1.0 -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
